top_signals.title: Asset Manager CSOP Lifts Options Cap for SK Hynix ETF
top_signals.summary: CSOP Asset Management Ltd. is lifting a ceiling on the use of options in a $14.4 billion leveraged exchange-traded fund linked to South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix Inc., giving the fund manager more flexibility after a wild rally in the company’s shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
